title: GUILD RAID!
notif: A local Guild has found your dungeon — the next adventurer wave is TWICE the usual size.

title: LEGENDARY SPEED RUNNER
notif: A legendary adventurer races for your boss — 2x stats, 2x speed, ignores all rooms and minions. Killing them grants a huge boss-XP windfall.

title: DUNGEON PESTILENCE
notif: A plague strikes your minions — every minion starts the day at HALF HP. Adventurers who melee them catch a damaging Blight.

title: CARTOGRAPHER'S CONVENTION
notif: Scholars tour every room then leave — everything they map feeds the next wave's intel. Kill them to stop the leak.

title: BLOOD MOON ECLIPSE
notif: A blood moon rises — your minions and boss deal 2x damage but also TAKE 2x damage, and kills drop no gold.

title: NEGOTIATION DAY
notif: A Guild diplomat arrives tonight — PAY tribute (25% of gold) for a free day with no wave, or REFUSE for a +50% wave.

title: RIVAL DUNGEON
notif: A rival dungeon invades — a full wave of its T1/T2 minions plus a boss-sized T3 champion, here to destroy your boss.

title: TWITCH CON
notif: A chaotic, endless wave of streamer adventurers floods in — random chat-command effects fire on them all day.

title: DARK DEAL
notif: A demon waits in your boss room tonight — click it to take a FREE dark pact, at the cost of half the boss's HP for the day.

title: COSPLAY CONTEST
notif: Adventurers in monster costumes visit — most (75%) won't fight your minions unless attacked first.

title: LOOT GOBLIN HEIST
notif: Loot goblins raid your hoard — each one that escapes steals 10% of your gold. Kill them for a big gold payout.

title: TAX SEASON
notif: The Guild taxes you — lose 20% of your gold at day start, but every kill today pays DOUBLE gold.

title: PATRON'S BLESSING
notif: A dark patron favours you — your boss earns DOUBLE XP from every adventurer killed today.

title: MEMORY PLAGUE
notif: An amnesia plague erases the Guild's maps — the next wave arrives knowing NOTHING about your dungeon.

title: THE GAMBLER'S COIN
notif: A gambling imp offers a coin flip tonight — WAGER your treasury for a 50/50 chance to double it, or lose half.

title: DENSE FOG
notif: Thick fog fills the halls — adventurers barely learn anything today, so your dungeon's exposure stays low.

title: CREEPING MIASMA
notif: A toxic miasma fills the dungeon — everything takes steady chip damage all day, your minions and boss included.

title: TREMORS
notif: Quakes rock the dungeon — every few seconds a random room is struck, damaging everyone standing in it.

title: ARCANE STORM
notif: An arcane storm surges overhead — adventurer class abilities recharge far faster all day long.

title: BOUNTY HUNTERS
notif: A pack of bounty hunters replaces the wave — they hunt down your strongest minion, ignoring everything else.

title: ZOMBIE HORDE
notif: A massive zombie horde replaces the wave — slow and weak, but enormous in number, mauling everything in reach.

title: INFAMY SPIKE
notif: Your infamy spikes — a wave 50% larger than usual, and every adventurer in it is a hardened hero.

title: BLACK MARKET
notif: A smuggler visits tonight — pay gold (price scales with day + boss level) for a free random unlocked minion, delivered to your dungeon.

title: MERCENARY CONTRACT
notif: A mercenary captain offers a contract tonight — pay gold (price scales with day + boss level) to hire an elite double-stat minion for 3 days.

title: CURSED RELIC
notif: A cursed relic surfaces tonight — CLAIM a gold-paying chest, but every adventurer wave DOUBLES while you keep it.

title: THE SABOTEUR
notif: Alongside the day's wave, an untouchable saboteur slips in — they disable EVERY trap in your dungeon for the day, then leave.

title: PATCH 0.0.0
notif: The server pushed a broken patch. Every adventurer today is a Cheater — anti-cheat disabled, all cheats buffed, kills pay double. Random admin console commands fire on the dungeon as the build self-destructs.

title: THE SACRIFICIAL ALTAR
notif: A blood altar rises in your boss chamber tonight — sacrifice an unknown price for an unknown permanent buff to all your minions.

title: THE DEMON'S WAGER
notif: A demon offers a wager tonight — your boss level on a coin flip. WIN: level up immediately. LOSE: drop a level and lose every benefit that came with it.

title: THE TINKERER'S WORKSHOP
notif: A goblin tinkerer arrives tonight — pick one of three room upgrades. The chosen upgrade affects every current and future room of that type for the rest of the run.

title: THE SPEEDRUN CHANNEL
notif: A speedrun stream raids your dungeon — every adventurer in today's wave is the same random class. Run start! Let's go!

title: BOSS ROYALE
notif: Every rival overlord descends at once — one of each kind, 11 bosses storming the dungeon for a single day, all hunting your throne. No adventurers today. Survive the gauntlet.

title: TREASURE HUNTERS
notif: Word of your hoard got out — today's whole wave is here for the loot. They ignore your throne entirely, rush your treasure chests, and flee once they've robbed them. Guard your gold. (You can't sell chests tonight.)

title: GOBLIN MARKET
notif: A goblin peddler sets up shop tonight only — every price in the build menu is scrambled. Some are steep bargains, others are shameless ripoffs. Check the tags and stock up on the deals.
